subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast heard the Call and responded with "Here am I! O my Lord, the Most Glorious!" If thou wouldst cast thy gaze toward the supreme horizon, the lights of the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من سمع الندآء و لبی یا ربی الابهی اگر نظر را بافق اعلی اندازی انوار ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @light and darkness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
